proofs.title: Proof Index
proofs.establishes: Canonical overview of the proof receipt surface

proofs.title: Wire Conformance
proofs.establishes: Deterministic wire mechanics and Haskell ↔ Rust conformance

proofs.title: Trace Semantics
proofs.establishes: Materialized vs pending_fetch semantics in deterministic trace output

proofs.title: Revoke Semantics
proofs.summary: trace.note revoke present; no lineage deletion

proofs.title: Full Body Rust Conformance
proofs.establishes: Rust verifier parity for put/use/xform/attest/revoke body kinds

proofs.title: Spaces Workflow
proofs.establishes: Bounded space-local workflow semantics for put/xform/attest/revoke/alias/trace under active-member signing
proofs.summary: space new -> identity derive/use -> put -> xform -> attest -> revoke -> alias set -> trace

proofs.title: Spaces Must-Reject
proofs.establishes: Fail-closed behavior for space-local attest/revoke wrappers and append guards
proofs.summary: attest/revoke wrappers reject unresolved targets, malformed evidence, unreachable revoke targets, and appends against topics with rejected messages

proofs.title: Federated Handoff
proofs.establishes: Locality by default across spaces, with explicit interoperability only through a handoff artifact
proofs.summary: space alpha and space beta trace locally; cross-space relation exists only through an explicit handoff artifact

proofs.title: Federated Must-Reject
proofs.establishes: Fail-closed federation boundary for foreign references, malformed handoff imports, and foreign-local authority assumptions
proofs.summary: no reference without receipt; no import without valid receipt; no authority without local grant
